examples: So, if Apple adopted biometrics in its iPhone, it could be awesome.
ZDNet's own Jason Perlow has often talked about the need for biometrics.
And in some cases biometrics can enhance both security and convenience, says Mr Harris.
Fingerprints, DNA, and the retina and iris of the eye are other examples of biometrics.
For now, many of the biometrics databases in the United States are still separated.
